<<leadership during the cold war>>

During the cold war, the united states had a president in charge. [address] was the main leader for the country. The soviet union had a general secretary in charge.

* * *

The cold war involved a lot of tension between two superpowers. [trip] was a key event that showed the rivalry. [book] was used to understand the situation better.

* * *

The cold war lasted for many years. [alcohol] was not a main topic during this time. The committee was formed to handle the situation.
